name: A.m.delight Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, sugar, baking soda, cinnamon and salt.
2. In another bowl, beat eggs; add oil, milk and vanilla. Mix well.
3. Stir the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients until just combined.
4. Fold in the remaining ingredients (apples, carrots, coconut, raisins, and sliced almonds).
5. Fill greased or paper-lined muffin cups three-fourths full.
6. Bake at 375 degrees for 20-25 minutes or until the muffins are done.
